name: codex-cleanup-harness8
summary: Run and review the eight-case live Codex household-cleanup regression grid.

mcp.boundary_notes: This skill triggers public task and harness recipes only. Cleanup behavior remains owned by molmo-realworld-cleanup.

capability_requirements.notes: The grid compares world-labels, sanitized world-labels, Grounding DINO camera labels, and RAW_FPV, with and without a DINO semantic-map-build prior.

scripts.summary: Builds the eight-row manifest, executes selected rows through just task::run, and renders JSON/HTML summaries.

refactor_signals: the grid grows beyond a focused Codex cleanup regression set
review requires cross-driver comparisons instead of one Codex route
harness logic starts encoding cleanup tactics instead of evidence collection
